headline: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Announces the Renewal of its Financing Partnership with Polaris
summary: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 25, 2026, Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) announced the renewal of its financing partnership with Polaris (PII), covering Sportsman all-terrain vehicles, Polaris RANGER, RZR, XPEDITION, and GENERAL side-by-side vehicles, as well as snowmobiles and Slingshot vehicles. The companies have partnered […]
